== Notes for [[Item:Q91325|Q91325]] ==

ID: I82282

Name: Apollonis of Cyzicus

Given Name: Apollonis

Surname: of Cyzicus

Sex: F

_UID: AE0A4E5934A23144A69989D6CAFC7B72FB3A

Change Date: 26 Nov 2005

Death: Y

Marriage 1 Attalus I Soter of Syria

Married:

Children

Eumenes II of Pergamum

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I82282

OF CYZICUS

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
